description: Writing exercises of the Hebrew alphabet (recto) and Atbash alphabetical order (verso) ending with the phrase "מנצפ׳׳ך צופים אמרום". On the upper right corner of the verso a partial date is also listed with the day of the week "יום ב" and "" indicating the week of the Vayishlach parsha. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
